role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Strictly analyzed scripts and place names (e.g., 'GR' abbreviation, German text).
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Discussed forest types and alpine vegetation zones.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road sign colors, typography, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Evaluated street furniture (lamps, containers) and architectural styles.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. The linguistic and regulatory agents provided definitive evidence (place names, canton codes, sign standards) that made the correct identification (Switzerland) unambiguous. The tournament correctly prioritized this hard evidence over the visual similarities of the landscape and botanics.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: All cited text ('Elestastrasse', 'Bad Ragaz', etc.) is clearly visible.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Alpine peaks and valley settlement accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Forest types described are consistent with the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Signage colors and shapes match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Street furniture and building styles accurately observed.
